nvidia.overview: NVIDIA is the dominant supplier of AI GPUs (H100, H200, B200) and CUDA software ecosystem. Primary beneficiary of the global AI infrastructure buildout.

business_segments.Data Center: AI/ML training and inference GPUs, networking (Mellanox). ~80%+ revenue.
business_segments.Gaming: GeForce RTX GPUs for PC gaming. ~10% revenue.
business_segments.Professional Visualization: Quadro/RTX Ada for creative and engineering workloads.
business_segments.Automotive: Drive platform for autonomous vehicles and infotainment.

nvidia.key_metrics: Data center revenue growing 200%+ YoY (2024-2025). CUDA has 4M+ developers. Blackwell (B200) represents next major product cycle.
nvidia.etf_impact: NVDA is the largest weight in SMH (~20%), QQQ (~8%), and a major SPY component. Any NVIDIA earnings guidance, data center demand signals, or export control news directly moves these ETFs.

apple.overview: World's largest company by market cap. Integrated hardware/software ecosystem with iPhone as the primary revenue driver. Growing services business (~25% of revenue, higher margins).

business_segments.Services: App Store, iCloud, Apple Music, Apple TV+, Apple Pay. ~25% revenue, 70%+ gross margin.
business_segments.Mac: Personal computers with Apple Silicon (M-series chips).
business_segments.iPad & Wearables: Tablets, Apple Watch, AirPods, Vision Pro.

apple.key_metrics: 2B+ active installed devices. Services revenue growing double digits. Apple Intelligence (AI) integration is the next growth catalyst.
apple.etf_impact: AAPL is a top weight in SPY (~7%), QQQ (~9%), and a major broad market component. iPhone cycle demand, services growth, and regulatory actions (App Store, EU DMA) are key drivers.

tesla.overview: EV market leader transitioning from pure automaker to AI/robotics/energy company. Highest-beta mega-cap stock, sensitive to CEO actions and market sentiment.

business_segments.Automotive: Model 3/Y/S/X, Cybertruck. ~80% revenue. Facing increasing EV competition.
business_segments.Energy Storage: Megapack, Powerwall. Fastest growing segment, ~10% revenue.
business_segments.FSD & Robotics: Full Self-Driving software, Optimus humanoid robot. Long-term value driver.

tesla.key_metrics: Vehicle deliveries ~1.8M annually (2024). Gross margin compression from price wars. FSD regulatory approval progress is key catalyst.
tesla.etf_impact: TSLA is a major component in QQQ (~4%), SPY (~2%). Extremely high beta — moves 2-3x the market on average. Delivery numbers, margin guidance, and FSD progress are primary movers.

microsoft.overview: Enterprise software and cloud computing leader. Azure is the #2 cloud provider behind AWS. Major AI investment through OpenAI partnership.

business_segments.Intelligent Cloud: Azure, SQL Server, GitHub, enterprise services. ~40% revenue.
business_segments.Personal Computing: Windows, Xbox, Surface, Activision Blizzard. ~25% revenue.

microsoft.key_metrics: Azure revenue growing 30%+ YoY. Copilot (AI assistant) monetization across Office, GitHub, and Security is the next growth layer. $10B+ annual AI infrastructure capex.
microsoft.etf_impact: MSFT is the largest weight in SPY (~7%) and QQQ (~9%). Azure cloud growth vs AWS/GCP, Copilot adoption rates, and enterprise IT spending trends are key drivers.

amazon.overview: Global e-commerce leader and largest cloud provider (AWS). Diversified business spanning retail, cloud, advertising, logistics, and streaming.

business_segments.AWS: Cloud computing market leader (~32% share). ~20% revenue but majority of operating profit.
business_segments.Advertising: Fast-growing high-margin business, ~10% revenue. Now #3 digital ad platform.

amazon.key_metrics: AWS revenue growing 20%+ YoY, reaccelerating on AI demand. Advertising growing 25%+ YoY. Retail margins improving via logistics efficiency.
amazon.etf_impact: AMZN is a major component in SPY (~4%), QQQ (~5%). AWS growth rate, retail margin expansion, and advertising revenue are key drivers.

alphabet.overview: Parent of Google and YouTube. Dominates search advertising globally. Growing cloud (GCP) and AI (Gemini) businesses.

business_segments.Google Search: Search ads, ~60% revenue. Market share 90%+ globally.

alphabet.key_metrics: Search ad revenue driven by AI Overviews integration. Google Cloud approaching profitability. Waymo expanding robotaxi service. Gemini AI model competing with GPT.
alphabet.etf_impact: GOOGL is a major weight in SPY (~4%), QQQ (~5%). Search market share, AI integration progress, and antitrust regulatory risk are key drivers.

meta.overview: Social media giant (Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp, Threads). Dominant in digital advertising. Massive AI infrastructure investment for metaverse and LLM development.

business_segments.Advertising: Facebook + Instagram ads. ~97% revenue. Advanced AI-driven ad targeting.
business_segments.Reality Labs: Quest VR headsets, Ray-Ban Meta smart glasses, metaverse. Heavy losses (~$15B/yr).
business_segments.AI Research: Llama open-source LLMs. Leading AI research (FAIR).

meta.key_metrics: 3.3B+ daily active people across apps. Ad revenue growing 20%+ YoY. Llama models widely adopted. Reels monetization driving growth.
meta.etf_impact: META is a major component in SPY (~2.5%), QQQ (~5%). Ad revenue growth, AI investment returns, and regulatory risk (privacy, antitrust) are key drivers.

ai & semiconductor.overview: The AI semiconductor sector is experiencing unprecedented demand driven by generative AI training and inference. NVIDIA dominates AI GPUs while broader semiconductor industry benefits from data center expansion.
ai & semiconductor.market_dynamics: Key drivers: AI/ML training demand (H100/H200/B200), data center capex from hyperscalers, edge AI deployment, export controls to China. Supply chain constraints easing but demand still exceeding supply for leading-edge AI chips.
ai & semiconductor.etf_impact: SMH (VanEck Semiconductor ETF) is HIGHLY sensitive to: NVIDIA earnings, AI demand indicators, data center capex guidance from hyperscalers, China export controls, chip supply/demand dynamics.

us equity market.overview: US equity markets (NYSE, NASDAQ) are the world's largest. S&P 500 and Nasdaq-100 are the primary benchmarks. Current cycle driven by AI investment and mega-cap tech earnings.

key_indices.S&P 500: Top 500 US companies by market cap. SPY tracks this. Broadest large-cap benchmark.
key_indices.Nasdaq-100: 100 largest non-financial Nasdaq stocks. QQQ tracks this. Heavy tech concentration (~60%).

us equity market.market_dynamics: Key drivers: Fed interest rate policy, inflation data (CPI/PCE), employment reports, corporate earnings (especially mega-cap tech), geopolitical risk, AI investment cycle.
us equity market.etf_impact: SPY and QQQ are DIRECTLY impacted by: Fed rate decisions, CPI/PCE data, jobs reports, mega-cap tech earnings, AI capital expenditure announcements, Treasury yield movements.

technology.overview: Technology sector is the dominant driver of US equity markets, led by the Magnificent 7 (NVDA, AAPL, MSFT, AMZN, GOOGL, META, TSLA). High growth but rate-sensitive valuations.
technology.market_dynamics: Innovation cycles rapid. Key risks: regulatory scrutiny (antitrust, AI regulation), interest rate sensitivity (growth valuations), concentration risk in mega-caps.
technology.etf_impact: Tech-heavy ETFs (QQQ, SMH) are sensitive to: Fed rate expectations, AI investment cycles, Big Tech earnings, chip export controls, cybersecurity incidents.
